summary: Extend `watchlist items` to scan older `Filings.Files` pages whose date range overlaps the requested `--since`/`--until` window.
reason: Same Filings.Recent ~400-filing cap surfaced for find13FAccession also hides older watchlist matches when the window extends past Recent. Refactored the per-CIK scan into a closure and applied it to Recent plus every overlapping older page. filingsPageOverlaps now treats zero start/end as unbounded so an open-ended window doesn't reject every page.
